events.title: Shared Childhood
events.subtitle: The Classroom Silence
events.description: We shared the same school yard and classroom. Though we rarely spoke, our paths were already subtly aligned under the same sky.

events.title: The Growth Years
events.subtitle: Separate Paths, Shared Growth
events.description: We grew up in different directions. You entered the world of Biotechnology, discovering your love for science, while I focused on engineering. Days turned into years of silence.

events.title: The Reconnection
events.subtitle: Instagram Bridge
events.description: A random scroll, a simple direct message. A bridge was built across the years of silence. We started talking, finding common ground we never knew existed.

events.title: One Beautiful Month
events.subtitle: Conversations & Comfort
events.description: Thirty days of constant connection. Shareable moments, late-night thoughts, and daily updates. You became my daily dose of peace.

events.title: Your Birthday
events.subtitle: Celebrating Priyadharshika
events.description: Wishing you the happiest birthday as you turn 21, ready to take on the world of M.Sc Biotechnology and beyond. This digital gift is for you.
